text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hmm, yes. I've indeed suffered a minor injury...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh? But this is as minor as they come.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I hail from the Mejiro family, yes?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
How am I to realize my ambitions if I allow
something so trivial to impede my progress?
choice_data_list: As your trainer, I can't ignore this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
How am I to realize my ambitions if I allow
something so trivial to impede my progress?
choice_data_list: As your trainer, I can't ignore this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...I've seen them—the strong, who carry on
through the hardest of times with their heads held
high.
choice_data_list: You should rest now so you can carry on too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, indeed. I wasn't quite thinking straight for
a moment there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
How unbecoming of me. You have my word that I
shall compensate for this dishonorable blunder
through my running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that in exchange, she has to stop the
second something feels off.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much. Now then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Why is it... that I can't seem to... move forward?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Mejiro Bright's body was closer to its
limit than she realized. I hurriedly recommend
that she rest...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
As I'm unable to move, I shall study to ensure that
my next training session is fruitful.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
This will be my routine for the time
being—recuperating while finding new ways to
improve.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Mejiros are known for turning even crises into
opportunities, you see.
